movesList.name: Skull Crusher
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, Aw, AU, TU

movesList.name: Berserker
movesList.input: hold B or C, Aw, To, TU

movesList.name: Hammer Blast
movesList.input: hold B or C, Up, Aw, Dn

movesList.name: Power Hammer
movesList.input: Aw, AD, Dn, push B or C

movesList.name: Cursed Kick
movesList.input: hold B or C, TD, AD, To

movesList.name: Iron Fist
movesList.input: Aw, AD, Dn, To, push Y or Z

movesList.name: Head Rocker
movesList.input: To, Dn, To, Y or Z

movesList.name: Curse Slam
movesList.input: hold Y or Z, To, TU, Up, Dn

movesList.name: Fang Gutter
movesList.input: Aw, AD, To, push B or C

movesList.name: The Mutilator
movesList.input: tap Dn, Dn + Y or Z
